message:
chore: Add .npmignore for npm package

- Exclude source files (*.ts, src/)
- Exclude ONNX models (*.onnx, models/, onnx/)
- Exclude development files (.env, tests/, validation/)
- Exclude build artifacts and editor files
- Keep compiled dist/, .claude agents, and docs/

Package size: 577KB (2.2MB unpacked)
Total files: 383
Agents included: 66

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,70 @@
+# Source files (only ship compiled dist/)
+src/
+*.ts
+tsconfig.json
+config/tsconfig.json
+
+# Tests and validation
+tests/
+test/
+validation/
+*.test.js
+*.spec.js
+
+# Development files
+.env
+.env.*
+!.env.example
+.claude-flow/
+.swarm/
+.hive-mind/
+memory/
+coordination/
+
+# Build artifacts
+*.tsbuildinfo
+.eslintrc.*
+.prettierrc
+
+# Git and CI
+.git/
+.github/
+.gitignore
+.gitattributes
+
+# Editor files
+.vscode/
+.idea/
+*.swp
+*.swo
+*~
+
+# Logs
+*.log
+logs/
+
+# Node modules (will be in user's install)
+node_modules/
+
+# ONNX models (too large for npm)
+*.onnx
+models/
+onnx/
+
+# Documentation source (keep only built docs)
+*.md.bak
+.doctrees/
+
+# OS files
+.DS_Store
+Thumbs.db
+
+# Lock files (use package-lock in the package)
+yarn.lock
+pnpm-lock.yaml
+bun.lockb
+
+# Test output
+test-output/
+coverage/
+.nyc_output/
